allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $response.Content | Select-String -Pattern "Amazon Deal Finder|page.tsx" | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; if \($response.Content -match "Amazon Deal Finder"\) { Write-Host "✓ Page loaded correctly" } else { Write-Host "✗ Page shows 404 or wrong content" } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
